sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check which token moved
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'W', 'B', 'c']:
        b = n['boundary']
        minr = min(p[0] for p in b)
        minc = min(p[1] for p in b)
        maxr = max(p[0] for p in b)
        maxc = max(p[1] for p in b)
        if n['pixels'] <= 20:
            print(f"id={n['id']:2d} color={n['color']} px={n['pixels']:3d} [{minr},{minc}]-[{maxr},{maxc}] children={n['children']}")

# ASCII around tokens
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(29, 34):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][15:40]
    row_str = row_str.replace('g', '·')
    print(f"R{i}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
